timeline.title: The journey begins
timeline.event: My journey began in the Information Technology technical program at ETEC Atibaia, where I learned programming fundamentals, object-oriented programming, hardware maintenance, and website and application development.

timeline.title: First stage completed
timeline.event: I completed my first qualification as an IT technician. For my final project, I built a full-stack web application with PHP and MySQL.

timeline.title: Starting college
timeline.event: I began my degree at FATEC Bragança Paulista. Over three years, I deepened my knowledge of programming, design patterns, hardware, and IT governance.

timeline.title: First opportunity
timeline.event: I started my career in technology as a software quality analyst. Those six months gave me valuable hands-on experience.

timeline.title: Started as a developer
timeline.event: I began working as a developer at Quality Digital, building e-commerce applications with VTEX and ReactJS while applying design patterns and agile practices.

timeline.title: Systems Analyst
timeline.event: For my graduation project, I built a React Native and Node.js application for managing internship opportunities and completed my degree in Systems Analysis and Development.

timeline.title: Jamstack and NextJS
timeline.event: I started working on Jamstack projects using VTEX headless architecture, including Plurix, Vivara stores, and Tata Supermarkets.

timeline.title: Getting to know Deco.cx
timeline.event: While freelancing for Adaptio, I had my first experience with Deco.cx by building a custom product page for the Aviator store.

timeline.title: English course
timeline.event: I completed my first English course focused on conversation.

timeline.title: Web full-stack
timeline.event: I worked at dna360 as a web developer, building solutions with VTEX, Wake Commerce, and Deco.cx.

timeline.title: Front-end Developer
timeline.event: I provided development services to B8One, building and maintaining robust VTEX and Wake Commerce projects. My work included advanced custom features and continuous platform improvements focused on performance, scalability, and user experience.

timeline.title: Front-end Developer
timeline.event: I currently work as a developer at Avanti, collaborating with design, product, and technology teams to build and maintain robust VTEX and Deco.cx projects. I implement advanced features, integrate complex solutions, and continuously improve platforms with a strong focus on performance, scalability, and user experience.

Hero.title: Nice to meet you, my name is Lucas Viana!
Hero.titleLead: Nice to meet you, my name is
Hero.description: I am a software developer with over 6 years of experience building bespoke digital solutions, focused on performance, usability, and results for web and mobile products.

MyWork.title: Building high-performance, innovative solutions
MyWork.description: Over more than 6 years of building digital solutions, I have worked on SaaS platforms, e-commerce stores, high-converting landing pages, and web and mobile applications, always focused on performance, scalability, usability, and aligning technology and design with business goals.
MyWork.imageAlt: Lucas Viana working at his development setup

benefits.title: End-to-end services to drive your digital business forward

development.title: Website and app development
development.description: I build web and mobile applications focused on performance, scalability, and a modern experience from start to finish.

automation.title: AI-powered automation
automation.description: I build intelligent automations and workflows with n8n and Make, integrating APIs and AI models to reduce manual work and streamline processes.

seo.title: Optimization and SEO
seo.description: I build fast, accessible, and well-structured pages, applying SEO best practices to improve performance, search rankings, and user experience.
